title: 宝塚記念の後に・シンデレラ粉砕

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Cinderella or not, I shall cut down,
crush, and blast into oblivion all opposition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is a beauty that surpasses Cinderella's. It is
that of I! T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My prince... Oh, how beautiful you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O holds nothing back and defeats
Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may try to adopt the air of a prince, but the
Overlord comes through loud and clear. Nothing
new there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I'm sorry. I finally challenged you in a
race, but I couldn't put up a good fight.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
At the very last minute... all I could think was how
I can't possibly win.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your ego fails to be the source of your effort.
That may be your weak point, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So find your source in me! Strengthen yourself and strive to rouse my competitive spirit!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do it for you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You wish to become my eternal adversary,
do you not? In which case...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must forget yourself and charge ahead
unflinchingly! Just like the others have done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They look around to see the other racers staring
them down with malice in their eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Opera O recognizes she was their target
after all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everyone's faces... Their eyes... They all
look so intense...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But can I really be like that? Could I ever look at
you that way?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well, Doto. I have already declared that
I'm moving my pieces on the board toward the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have until then to consider whether or not
you wish to become my eternal adversary.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O turns and leaves the track without
batting an eye to the numerous hateful stares
aimed at her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A task yet remains for Doto, just as a task yet
remains for us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I may have prevailed over her... but I fell a breath
short of claiming the spotlight. Do you know why?
choice_data_list: You felt the pressure on you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed. Heh, you never miss a beat.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It proved quite difficult to run like the Overlord
whilst in the sights of every racer there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Saw through that as well, did you? Of
course not. The path of a king is no cakewalk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As the Overlord, I have to surpass these walls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We have until fall to contemplate the difficulties.
With our heads put together, we will find a
solution, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall arrive at the Japan Cup with all the majesty
befitting a ruler for this nation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the attack on the Overlord that Grass
Wonder predicted has become a real threat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to find a way to help her push through and
establish the foundation for her dynasty.
